summary: Repository inspection supports promotion. The task maps directly to docs/product-specs/oauth-consent-and-token-runtime.md, implements the scoped authorization_code token exchange without client_credentials, signs RS256 JWTs with the required claims, persists issued-token metadata by jti with revocation-ready fields, and has passing required deterministic gates in state/deterministic-checks.json.
satisfied_exit_criteria: Authorization codes exchange exactly once in the implemented sequential flow: exchange marks usedAt and reuse returns invalid_grant.
JWT claims match the PRD contract: iss, aud/resource, sub, client_id, grant_type, iat, exp, jti, scope, and endpoint_permissions are created and tested with RS256 signature verification.

Invalid exchanges return deterministic OAuth-style errors for unsupported grant, missing fields, unknown code, redirect mismatch, consumed code, expired code, disabled user, invalid client id, and invalid client secret.

Issued token records are revocation-ready: OAuthIssuedToken stores unique jti, client/user ids, grantType, scope, resource, endpointPermissionsJson, issuedAt, expiresAt, and nullable revokedAt with indexes.
Required commands passed: npm run test:unit, npm run test:e2e -- --grep @oauth-code-token, and npm run verify.
